name: Dark Contract with the Different Dimension
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>異</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>次</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>元</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>契</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>約</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>やく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>書</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Once per turn, during your Standby Phase: Take 1000 damage. You can only use each of the following effects of "Dark Contract with the Different Dimension" once per turn. You can shuffle 2 "Dark Contract" cards from your GY into the Deck, then target 1 card in your opponent's field or GY; banish it. If this card is destroyed: You can gain 500 LP, then if it was destroyed by an opponent's card effect, gain another 500 LP.
eff: Once per turn, during your Standby Phase: Take 1000 damage. You can only use each of the following effects of "Dark Contract with the Different Dimension" once per turn. You can shuffle 2 "Dark Contract" cards from your GY into the Deck, then target 1 card in your opponent's field or GY; banish it. If this card is destroyed: You can gain 500 LP, then if it was destroyed by an opponent's card effect, gain another 500 LP.

action: Returns from Graveyard to Deck for cost
